title: Full Pattern — Restaurant Menu API
description:
### Your Task

Build a Restaurant Menu API using ALL patterns.

### Requirements

- `MenuItem` entity: `id` (Long), `name` (String), `category` (String), `price` (Double), `vegetarian` (Boolean), `spiceLevel` (String)
- `MenuItemRequestDTO`: `name`, `category`, `price`, `vegetarian`, `spiceLevel`
- `MenuItemResponseDTO`: `id`, `name`, `category`, `price`, `vegetarian`, `spiceLevel`
- `MenuItemRepository` with: `findByCategory(String)`, `findByVegetarianTrue()`
- `MenuItemService`, `MenuItemController` at `/api/menu`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/menu` → all (200)
- `GET /api/menu/{id}` → by ID (200 or 404)
- `GET /api/menu/category/{category}` → by category (200)
- `GET /api/menu/vegetarian` → vegetarian items only (200)
- `POST /api/menu` → create (201)
- `PUT /api/menu/{id}` → update (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/menu/{id}` → delete (204 or 404)
hints: Same full pattern. You've done this many times now!
